tests_written: health returns HTTP 200 with degraded database status when DATABASE_URL is absent
app router builds without a database pool
users, OAuth accounts, and sessions round-trip through Postgres migrations
session revocation removes sessions from active-session lookup
needs_deeper_qa: Run make db-migrate once sqlx-cli is installed or CI has a migration runner
Confirm the future tower-sessions store table contract is compatible with the sessions schema before wiring auth-001
Exercise /health against the provisioned RDS DATABASE_URL after preflight fills .env

tests_written: user-owned repositories enforce per-owner case-insensitive uniqueness
repository creation grants owner permissions and paginates through the standard list envelope
users cannot create repositories under a different user owner
organization repositories require org owner/admin membership
teams and team memberships persist under organizations
commit metadata and repository git refs round-trip through Postgres
needs_deeper_qa: make db-migrate still needs a sqlx-cli-equipped environment; the migration harness passed through cargo tests
Repository JSON routes are compiled but should be exercised through HTTP once auth/session middleware exists
Owner login for user-owned repositories currently falls back to email until username/profile setup ships

tests_written: default issue labels are created idempotently per repository
issues can be created, listed by status, commented on, reacted to, closed, and read through ordered timeline events
users without repository permissions cannot create issues
pull requests share the repository issue number sequence and keep a linked issue record
pull requests can be listed, fetched by number, merged, and read through ordered timeline events
make check, make test, and TEST_DATABASE_URL-backed make test passed
needs_deeper_qa: HTTP issue and pull request JSON routes are compiled but should be exercised through real auth once auth-001 lands
Concurrent issue and pull request creation should be stress-tested because number allocation currently uses max(number)+1
Milestone, cross-reference, and label editing APIs are schema-ready but not exposed until their product features are selected
Browser smoke test skipped because infra-001 phase 3 is backend schema/data access only

tests_written: Actions workflows, workflow runs, jobs, and steps round-trip through Postgres
Workflow run lifecycle transitions record started/completed timestamps and conclusions
Package records and package versions persist with case-insensitive per-package version uniqueness
Webhook registration and webhook delivery retry metadata persist, including response status and next retry time
Notifications can be created, listed, counted as unread, and marked read
Postgres-backed job leases enforce single-worker acquisition, failure retry, and completion
needs_deeper_qa: Actual Actions worker execution, logs, artifacts, and S3 storage are metadata-ready but not implemented in this phase
Webhook HTTP delivery signing and receiver calls need full QA when the delivery worker ships
Notification fanout and email delivery are schema-ready but not connected to SES yet
make db-migrate still needs sqlx-cli installed; cargo tests applied the migration through SQLx's migrator
Browser smoke test skipped because infra-001 phase 4 is backend schema/data access only
